name: clawcode
desc: ClawCode is claude code inspired implementation in python and Rust focused on agents and experience-based evolution, and is an Open-source coding-agent CLI for…
descFull: ClawCode is claude code inspired implementation in python and Rust focused on agents and experience-based evolution, and is an Open-source coding-agent CLI for Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimit, Ollama, Codex, GitHub Models, and 200+ models via OpenAI-compatible APIs.
